purpose: Static benchmark fixture for V1.9 operational optimization checks.

comparisons.before: Python-side full queued-job scan for priority selection.
comparisons.after: SQL ordered claim with status/priority/created_at index.
comparisons.output_equivalence: claimed job ordering remains priority then creation time
same newest-first ordering within requested page

comparisons.before: unbounded read_text plus json.loads in common paths
comparisons.after: bounded json.load helper and top-level array streaming helper
comparisons.output_equivalence: same parsed JSON when artifact is under configured memory bound

comparisons.before: summary counts recomputed from workspace model on each caller path
comparisons.after: mtime/size keyed summary cache invalidated by workspace saves
comparisons.output_equivalence: same run/artifact/codex counts after cache miss or invalidation
